ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the player plays */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "detailed_position" TEXT /* Detailed position of the player (e.g., Point Guard, Shooting Guard) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Shortened version of the team name */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the team plays */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport (e.g., Soccer, Basketball) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., team, individual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team playing the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team playing the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Stadium A) */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won by the player */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total number of games drawn by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost by the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "win_percent" REAL /* Win percentage of the player */,
  "three_pointers_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage of the player */,
  "free_throws_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of games won by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total number of games drawn by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost by the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points against the team */,
  "win_percent" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins by the team */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_forms" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "current_form" TEXT /* String representing the current form (e.g., 'LWLLW') */,
  "last_five_games" TEXT /* Results of the last five games played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
